claim_status_terms.approved_safe_draft: Safe only when phrased as draft, target, planned, TBD, or verification workstream language.
claim_status_terms.conditional_requires_evidence: Potentially useful later, but blocked until the listed evidence and review gate are complete.
claim_status_terms.blocked_must_not_claim: Do not use in buyer-facing materials at this stage.

taxonomy.HoloEngine: Primary system taxonomy for buyer trust claims.
taxonomy.HoloGov: Included as the governance, selector, and control layer inside HoloEngine.
taxonomy.HoloVerify: Separate benchmark/evidence mode; not production customer payload handling.
taxonomy.HoloChat: Connected surface only where relevant and only if deployed as part of a customer-facing production system.
taxonomy.HoloBuild: Connected surface only where relevant and only if deployed as part of a customer-facing production system.
taxonomy.HoloBrain: Conditional only if enabled in deployment.

mode_boundary.production_customer_mode: Target flow for bounded ALLOW/ESCALATE review. Default audit logging is a metadata-only target unless a customer-enabled evidence-retention mode is configured.
mode_boundary.holoverify_benchmark_evidence_mode: May preserve frozen prompts, raw outputs, scoring maps, trace files, runtime manifests, failure autopsies, provenance audits, and operational notes for benchmark integrity.
mode_boundary.separation_rule: Benchmark/evidence retention must not be used as production privacy, retention, or customer-data-handling proof.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has draft trust architecture artifacts for enterprise trust review, including data-flow architecture, a SOC 2 readiness/gap assessment, a provider data-handling matrix, and an evidence binder index.
claims.missing_evidence: Formal legal/security approval for external package.
claims.claim_risk: Low if described as draft artifacts; high if framed as certification or completed readiness.
claims.buyer_facing_use_case: Opening response to buyer security diligence.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine is the primary trust system taxonomy; HoloGov is part of HoloEngine, while HoloChat and HoloBuild are connected surfaces only where they are deployed in a customer-facing production system.
claims.missing_evidence: Deployment-specific scope confirmation.
claims.claim_risk: Medium if connected surfaces are implied to be automatically covered.
claims.review_gate: Scope review for each buyer deployment.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine separates target production customer mode from HoloVerify benchmark/evidence mode in its trust architecture and claim language.
claims.missing_evidence: Storage, access-control, retention, and environment-separation evidence.
claims.claim_risk: Medium: safe as an architecture boundary, not as implementation proof.
claims.review_gate: Trust review plus evidence binder update.
claims.buyer_facing_use_case: Explaining benchmark artifacts without creating production privacy claims.

claims.claim_text: In target production customer mode, HoloEngine is designed to process bounded ALLOW/ESCALATE review requests rather than execute downstream customer business actions by default.
claims.missing_evidence: Deployment-specific execution-boundary evidence and UI/API wording review.
claims.claim_risk: Medium if shortened into a stronger operational guarantee.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine's target production audit-log design is metadata-only by default and excludes customer payload text, full prompt text, raw provider output text, private source documents, and unredacted conversations by default.
claims.missing_evidence: Runtime log samples, redaction tests, log storage/access evidence, retention settings.
claims.claim_risk: High if described as implemented production behavior.
claims.review_gate: Security evidence review before claiming implementation.
claims.buyer_facing_use_case: Buyer discussion of intended audit logging.

claims.claim_text: Customer-enabled evidence-retention mode is treated as a separate target mode requiring explicit configuration, retention settings, access controls, and deletion procedures.
claims.missing_evidence: Product configuration, deletion/export tests, support-access boundaries, customer documentation.
claims.claim_risk: High if implied to exist in production now.

claims.claim_text: Provider/vendor handling is a verification workstream covering provider terms, DPAs, subprocessors, retention settings, zero-retention eligibility, regional handling, and healthcare eligibility if healthcare customers are pursued.
claims.missing_evidence: Provider-specific contract review and legal signoff.
claims.claim_risk: Low if kept as a workstream; high if treated as verified coverage.
claims.review_gate: Legal review after provider evidence is collected.
claims.buyer_facing_use_case: Buyer questions about OpenAI, xAI, and MiniMax handling.

claims.claim_text: OpenAI, xAI, and MiniMax are listed as current benchmark/provider route vendors in the draft provider data-handling matrix, with retention, DPA, BAA/HIPAA, subprocessor, and data-residency posture marked TBD or VERIFY/TBD.
claims.missing_evidence: Provider account/configuration mapping and contract evidence.
claims.claim_risk: Medium: safe if TBD status remains explicit.

claims.claim_text: HoloVerify benchmark/evidence mode may preserve frozen prompts, raw outputs, scoring maps, traces, runtime manifests, failure autopsies, provenance audits, and operational notes for benchmark integrity.
claims.missing_evidence: Benchmark storage/access/retention proof and separation evidence.
claims.claim_risk: Medium: must not be presented as production customer data handling.
claims.review_gate: Trust review for any external benchmark explanation.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has identified SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria areas and gaps across Security, Availability where applicable, Confidentiality, Privacy where applicable, and Processing Integrity where applicable.
claims.missing_evidence: Auditor-scoped control matrix, implementation evidence, operating evidence.
claims.claim_risk: High if framed as SOC 2 readiness or compliance.
claims.buyer_facing_use_case: Showing structured readiness planning without claiming readiness.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has identified AI governance evidence workstreams for provider routing logs, selector version/hash logging, no scoring-map leakage, trace integrity, failure autopsy, model change control, and customer evidence-retention mode.
claims.missing_evidence: Runtime samples, leakage tests, release/change records, trace integrity proof.
claims.claim_risk: Medium: safe as a workstream; high as operating proof.
claims.buyer_facing_use_case: AI assurance discussion with technical buyers.

claims.claim_text: The current trust package is intended for design-partner diligence and gap closure planning, not for claims of certification, compliance, audit completion, or production operating effectiveness.
claims.missing_evidence: External-use approval and final buyer FAQ.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine production audit logs are metadata-only by default.
claims.missing_evidence: Runtime log samples, schema validation, redaction tests, log access controls, retention settings.
claims.review_gate: Security evidence review and Trust approval.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine production payloads are minimized before provider routing.
claims.missing_evidence: Prompt builder evidence, request schemas, minimization tests, redaction tests, route logs.
claims.buyer_facing_use_case: Data handling and AI governance diligence.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine enforces authentication, authorization, and tenant binding in production.
claims.missing_evidence: Auth design, MFA/service auth, RBAC matrix, tenant model, cross-tenant negative tests.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine enforces tenant isolation across runtime, storage, logs, traces, evidence stores, queues, and provider routing.
claims.missing_evidence: Tenant isolation tests, storage/log partitioning proof, provider route isolation evidence.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine encrypts data in transit and at rest in the deployed environment.
claims.missing_evidence: TLS configuration, provider API transport verification, storage encryption proof, key-management evidence.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has provider DPA coverage for OpenAI, xAI, or MiniMax.
claims.missing_evidence: Signed/accepted DPAs, contract exhibits, account mapping, legal signoff.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has BAA coverage or HIPAA-eligible provider handling for a healthcare deployment.
claims.missing_evidence: BAA availability, healthcare scope, HIPAA legal analysis, deployment controls, audit controls.

claims.claim_text: A provider route offers zero-retention handling for HoloEngine data.
claims.missing_evidence: Provider-specific contract proof, account/config mapping, route evidence, legal signoff.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine can meet a customer data-residency or regional-processing requirement.
claims.missing_evidence: Regional provider terms, infrastructure region mapping, route restrictions, legal review.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine supports customer data deletion requests in production.
claims.missing_evidence: Deletion SOP, request workflow, identity verification, backup handling, evidence-retention exceptions, test evidence.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has production incident response procedures.
claims.missing_evidence: IR policy, severity matrix, notification templates, escalation/on-call, tabletop records.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has controlled model/provider route change management.
claims.missing_evidence: Model route inventory, approval workflow, eval gates, rollback plan, customer notice criteria.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine records selector version/hash and provider/model route metadata for production decisions.
claims.missing_evidence: Runtime audit samples, selector release records, provider/model route logs, retention/access evidence.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine prevents scoring-map leakage into production or provider prompts.
claims.missing_evidence: Access controls, prompt-leakage tests, production runtime separation proof, negative tests.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine maintains tamper-evident production trace integrity.
claims.missing_evidence: Hash manifests, immutable storage configuration, access logs, chain-of-custody procedure.
claims.buyer_facing_use_case: Dispute review and regulated audit discussions.

claims.claim_text: HoloChat or HoloBuild is included in a buyer's HoloEngine trust scope.
claims.missing_evidence: Deployment-specific architecture, data inventory, retention/deletion model, access controls, scope approval.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine is SOC 2 ready.
claims.missing_evidence: Auditor-scoped readiness work, implementation evidence, operating evidence, legal review.
claims.review_gate: Block until formal readiness decision by counsel/auditor.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine is SOC 2 certified, SOC 2 compliant, SOC 2 Type I complete, or SOC 2 Type II complete.
claims.missing_evidence: Independent auditor report and approved scope language.
claims.review_gate: Block until actual report exists and wording is approved.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine is HIPAA ready or HIPAA compliant.
claims.missing_evidence: HIPAA legal analysis, BAA coverage, healthcare deployment controls, audit controls.
claims.review_gate: Block until healthcare scope is formally approved.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has DPA coverage with OpenAI, xAI, MiniMax, or all providers.
claims.missing_evidence: Signed/accepted provider DPAs, account mapping, legal signoff.
claims.review_gate: Block until contract evidence is collected.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has BAA coverage with OpenAI, xAI, MiniMax, or all providers.
claims.missing_evidence: BAA contracts, healthcare scope, legal review.

claims.claim_text: OpenAI, xAI, or MiniMax provide zero retention for HoloEngine data.
claims.missing_evidence: Provider-specific contract proof, account/config mapping, route evidence.
claims.review_gate: Block until provider-specific retention evidence exists.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine guarantees customer regional processing or data residency.
claims.missing_evidence: Regional-processing proof, infrastructure mapping, route restrictions, legal approval.
claims.review_gate: Block until residency evidence exists for the deployment.

claims.claim_text: Customer payloads are never sent to providers.
claims.missing_evidence: Deployment evidence proving route behavior for every production path, provider terms, tests.
claims.review_gate: Block; current target design allows minimum necessary provider-bound content where needed.

claims.claim_text: Customer payloads are never stored by HoloEngine.
claims.missing_evidence: End-to-end deployment evidence covering logs, evidence-retention mode, backups, support workflows, and provider flows.
claims.review_gate: Block until full storage/retention proof exists.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine production controls are implemented and operating effectively.
claims.missing_evidence: Implemented controls, operating evidence, review period evidence, independent validation if claimed.
claims.review_gate: Block until evidence and review period exist.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine has verified TLS 1.3, encryption coverage, or key-management specifics in production.
claims.missing_evidence: Deployment TLS evidence, encryption at rest proof, key-management evidence.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine uses RAM-only processing, 0 ms retention, or memory zeroing.
claims.missing_evidence: Implementation proof, runtime tests, legal/security review.

claims.claim_text: HoloVerify benchmark/evidence retention is equivalent to production customer data handling.
claims.missing_evidence: Not applicable; source artifacts require separation.
claims.review_gate: Permanently block unless architecture changes and legal/security approve.

claims.claim_text: HoloChat and HoloBuild are automatically covered by HoloEngine trust scope.
claims.missing_evidence: Deployment-specific scope and evidence.
claims.review_gate: Block until deployment scope is approved.

claims.claim_text: HoloEngine executes downstream customer business actions.
claims.missing_evidence: Separate customer deployment with controlled execution layer and approved claim language.

safe_design_partner_wording.standard: HoloEngine is in a trust-readiness buildout stage. We have draft repo-backed trust artifacts covering data flow, SOC 2 gap assessment, provider data handling, and an evidence binder index. These documents separate target production customer mode from HoloVerify benchmark/evidence mode and identify the evidence we still need before making stronger enterprise claims. We are not claiming SOC 2 readiness, SOC 2 certification, HIPAA readiness, DPA/BAA coverage, provider zero retention, data residency guarantees, or production operating effectiveness.
safe_design_partner_wording.short: We can share our current trust architecture and gap register. It is useful for diligence and design-partner planning, but it is not a compliance or certification claim.
safe_design_partner_wording.provider_specific: OpenAI, xAI, and MiniMax are listed as current benchmark/provider route vendors in our draft provider matrix. Provider retention, DPA, BAA/HIPAA, subprocessor, zero-retention, and data-residency posture are still verification workstreams and should be treated as TBD until contract and deployment evidence are reviewed.
safe_design_partner_wording.production_vs_benchmark: HoloEngine production customer mode and HoloVerify benchmark/evidence mode are intentionally separated in our trust architecture. Benchmark evidence may preserve artifacts for reproducibility; that should not be read as production customer-data retention behavior.

review_gates: Trust Lead review for any externally shared trust artifact.
Legal review for SOC 2, HIPAA, DPA, BAA, provider, retention, residency, and customer-data claims.
Security review for authentication, RBAC, tenant isolation, encryption, logging, monitoring, incident response, and vulnerability claims.
Privacy review for retention, deletion, support access, privacy notice, and evidence-retention claims.
Engineering/HoloGov review for model/provider routing logs, selector version/hash logging, trace integrity, no scoring-map leakage, model change control, and production evidence claims.
